# REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENTs generated by REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| ID | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Strategy content identifier. Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| MaximumQuantity | DECIMAL(28,10) | True |  | False |  | Maximum quantity. Default value populated from product definition can be override. |
| MinimumQuantity | DECIMAL(28,10) | True |  | False |  | Minimum quantity Default value populated from product definition can be override. |
| NumberOfCards | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Number of kanban cards. |
| ProductGroup | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | GROUP_ | Product group name. Linked to GROUP_ table. |
| ProductGroupClassID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | GROUP_ | Product Group class ID. Linked to GROUP_ table. |
| ProductGroupType | SMALLINT(5,0) | True |  | False | GROUP_ | Product group type. Linked to GROUP_ table. |
| ProductID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PRODUCT | Product Identifier. Linked to the Product table. |
| ReplenishQuantity | DECIMAL(28,10) | True |  | False |  | Kanban quantity Optimal batch size or quantity in one kanban |
| ReplenishStrategyID | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY | ID that denotes the Replenishment Strategy. Linked to the REPLENISH_STRATEGY table. |
| SequenceNo | INT(10,0) | False |  | False |  | Unique identifier inside one strategy. |
| UnitID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | UNIT | Unique identifier of the Unit. |
| UomCode | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | UOM | Used for replenishment, can be different that product default, must contains in list of defined uom for particular product. Linked to the Uom table. |

## Primary Key

- **PK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT** on `ID`

## Foreign Keys (this table -> other)

- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_Group** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT -> GROUP_ (`ProductGroup, ProductGroupType, ProductGroupClassID -> Group_, GroupType, GroupClassID`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_ProductID** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT -> PRODUCT (`ProductID -> ID`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_ReplenishStrategyID** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT -> REPLENISH_STRATEGY (`ReplenishStrategyID -> ID`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_UnitID** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT -> UNIT (`UnitID -> ID`)
- **FK_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_UomCode** — REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT -> UOM (`UomCode -> UomCode`)

## Referenced By (other tables -> this)

- **FK_KANBAN_CARD_ReplenishStraContSequenceNo** — KANBAN_CARD -> REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT (`ReplenishStrategyID, ReplenishStraContSequenceNo -> ReplenishStrategyID, SequenceNo`)

## Unique Indexes

- **UK_REPLENISH_STR_CONTENT_SequenceNo** on `ReplenishStrategyID, SequenceNo`

## Non-Unique Indexes

- **IF_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_Group** on `ProductGroup, ProductGroupType, ProductGroupClassID`
- **IF_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_ProductID** on `ProductID`
- **IF_REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT_UnitID** on `UnitID`
